name: GAF_SyteLine_RoutingSearch_Tool_v1
description: Search for existing routing operations on a standard job in SyteLine

data.api_docs:
Method: GET
Endpoint: /load/SLJobRoutes
CRITICAL: The endpoint above is RELATIVE — the service path 'CSI/IDORequestService/ido' is prepended automatically. Do NOT repeat the service path in the endpoint or add tenant names, config values, 'api', 'invoke', or extra segments.
Headers:
X-Infor-MongooseConfig: <site>
Query Parameters:
Parameter: properties
Format: STRING
Required: True
Description: Comma-separated list of properties to return. Use: Job,Suffix,OperNum,Wc,WcDescription,SetupHrsT,RunHrsTLbr,RunHrsTMch,_ItemId
Parameter: filter
Format: STRING
Required: True
Description: SQL WHERE clause to filter. Example: Job = '         2' AND Suffix = 0
Parameter: orderby
Format: STRING
Required: False
Description: Sort order. Use: OperNum ASC
Parameter: recordCap
Format: INTEGER
Required: False
Description: Maximum records to return. Default: 50
Example Request:
Search routing for job 2:
GET /load/SLJobRoutes?properties=Job,Suffix,OperNum,Wc,WcDescription,SetupHrsT,RunHrsTLbr,RunHrsTMch,_ItemId&filter=Job = '         2' AND Suffix = 0&orderby=OperNum ASC
data.responseInstructions:
The API responds with a JSON object containing an Items array with routing operations.
Key Response Fields:
- Items: Array of routing operation objects (empty if none found)
- Job: Job number
- OperNum: Operation number (10, 20, 30...)
- Wc: Work center code
- WcDescription: Work center description
- SetupHrsT: Setup hours
- RunHrsTLbr: Run labor hours per unit
- RunHrsTMch: Run machine hours per unit
- _ItemId: Record identifier
- Success: Boolean indicating API success
NOTE: Job numbers are left-padded with spaces to 10 chars (e.g., '         2').
CRITICAL - IF ERROR OCCURS INCLUDE THE BELOW IN RESPONSE
  ---DEBUG---
  FULL_URL: [The complete URL that was called]
  FULL_PAYLOAD: [The exact request body sent (JSON format)]
  FULL_RESPONSE: [The complete API response received]
  ---END DEBUG---

instructions:
Use this tool to search for existing routing operations on a standard job.
Routing operations define the manufacturing steps (work centers, setup/run times) for producing an item.
Filter by Job number and Suffix=0 for standard jobs.
NOTE: Job numbers are left-padded with spaces to 10 characters.

SITE PARAMETER (REQUIRED):
- The <site> placeholder must be filled with the site value from the agent's input
- Format: [TENANT]_DALS (e.g., '<YOUR_SITE>')
